summary: W874 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while combining W856 endpoint topology facts and W721 localized-right-adjoint data into one W726 endpoint/localized provider. From seven W874 field groups, the route reconstructs the W873 endpoint-facts provider and checks the direct bounded left calculus plus bounded derived infinity-category package through W873, W856, W853, W831, and W869/W870/W872. Product success remains false because the seven endpoint-localized route-data fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W874 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to the W726 endpoint/localized provider surface, but its seven concrete fields are still not instantiated.

Concrete W874 endpoint-localized data is not yet fully instantiated; the latest route boundary is boundary/relation data, target closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, and W726 endpoint/localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block the seven concrete W874 endpoint-localized provider field groups now isolated by W874.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
